name: Remote: Local P2P Client Connected to more than 100 Servers
notes: This rule triggers when a local host is operating as a Peer-to-Peer (P2P) client. This indicates a violation of local network policy and may indicate illegal activities, such as copyright infringement.
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when a flow matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when the flow matches Application is any of P2P
when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination IP in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination IP in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Remote: Local P2P Client Connected to more than 100 Servers on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when a flow matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when the flow matches Application is any of P2P
AND when at least 100 flows are seen with the same Source IP and different Destination IP in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Local P2P Client Connected to more than 100 Servers

Event description: Detects local hosts operating as a Peer-to-Peer (P2P) client. This indicates a violation of local network policy and may indicate illegal activities, such as copyright infringement.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
